body.description: Studio creation request specifying compute environment, container template, data-links to mount, resource allocations, and configuration options.

name.description: Studio name. Must be unique within the user or workspace context. Minimum length: 1 character, Maximum length: 100 characters.

description.description: Optional Studio description. Maximum length: 500 characters.

dataStudioToolUrl.description: Container image or Studio tool URL to use for the Studio session.

computeEnvId.description: Compute environment ID where the Studio session will run.

initialCheckpointId.description: Checkpoint numeric identifier to restore when creating the Studio.

gpu.description: Number of GPUs allocated to the Studio session.

cpu.description: Number of CPUs allocated to the Studio session.

memory.description: Amount of memory in MiB allocated to the Studio session.

mountData.description: Deprecated array of data-link IDs mounted in the Studio session. This field only supports data-link IDs without path prefixes. Can be `null` to preserve existing mounts.

environment.description: Array of environment variable key-value pairs set in the Studio session.

condaEnvironment.description: Conda package specification for custom packages installed in the Studio environment.

lifespanHours.description: Number of hours the Studio session will run before automatically stopping. A value of `0` indicates unlimited lifespan.

isPrivate.description: If true, only the Studio creator can connect to the session. Workspace administrators can still start, stop, and delete the Studio but cannot connect to it. Default: `false`.

labelIds.description: Array of label numeric identifiers to apply to the Studio.

spot.description: If `true`, requests spot or preemptible capacity when supported by the selected compute environment.

allOf.description: Remote repository configuration used to pre-fill or recreate a Studio session.

revision.description: Optional branch or tag to check out. Can be `null`.

commitId.description: Optional commit hash pinned for the remote repository. Can be `null`.

allOf.title: StudioRemoteConfiguration

remoteConfig.description: Remote repository configuration used to pre-fill the Studio form. Can be `null`.
